_comment: Apify web-scraper input for the competitor IA research use-case. Feed into apify~web-scraper or fork and customise.
pageFunction: async function pageFunction(context) { const { $, request } = context; const nav = []; $('nav a, header a').each((_, el) => { const text = $(el).text().trim(); if (text) nav.push(text); }); const headlines = []; $('main h1, main h2, main h3, section h1, section h2').each((_, el) => { const text = $(el).text().trim(); if (text) headlines.push(text); }); return { url: request.url, nav: Array.from(new Set(nav)).slice(0, 40), headlines: Array.from(new Set(headlines)).slice(0, 40), hero: $('section:first-of-type h1').text().trim() }; }
